Chat Edit: 'Implemented a functional file tree in file_tree_following_pattern.asm: added local tree view structs, real root/drive population via AddRootAndDrives, proper refresh, path reconstruction, and directory population with safe string handling. Added font application and common control initialization, fixed operand issues, and cleaned up data/structure layout.

Build check: ml assembled file_tree_following_pattern.asm successfully to masm_ide/build/file_tree_following_pattern.obj.

Next steps: hook Expand/Populate calls into your UI handlers (e.g., on item expand) and link the refreshed tree into the main layout flow.'

Chat Edit: 'I recommend moving on to the tab‑control enhancement next. Adding the close‑button glyph, owner‑draw handling, and click‑to‑switch logic will give the IDE a fully functional multi‑document interface, which is a natural next step before expanding the file‑explorer or menu actions. Let me know if you’d like me to start implementing the tab‑control code (or if you prefer another area).'
Chat Edit: 'Please fully go over source IDE and In full implementation or For now = Full Production ready code fully working '
Chat Edit: '@agent Try Again'
Chat Edit: '@agent Try Again'
Chat Edit: 'Please fully continue enhancing already finished and started Phases and continue with a fresh todos!'

Chat Edit: 'Next steps (Phase 6 continued)

Make perf HUD parts visible and aligned in status bar (ensure SB parts sizing).
Add lightweight guards to avoid excessive logging in production builds.
Profile and optimize any slow paths spotted (file enumeration, TreeView insert usage).
Optionally add a “View Logs” menu item to open the log via OpenLogViewer().
Want me to run a verbose build to collect compiler diagnostics and fix any resulting errors so the integration is validated end-to-end?'
